**A State of Tranquility **   
 \ nRight now , I feel a calmness that’s difficult to put into words . It’s as if all the noise in my mind has dimmed , leaving behind a peaceful hum . My thoughts , usually darting in every direction , have slowed , moving like a gentle stream instead of a chaotic river .   
 \ nThere’s a warmth in my chest , a soft reassurance that , in this moment , everything is as it should be . My body feels lighter , as though I’ve shrugged off an invisible weight I hadn’t realized I was carrying . Even my breathing feels deeper , more deliberate , as if I’ve finally tuned into a rhythm I’d been out of sync with for too long .
